hypothesis: Mutating positions 5, 6, and 11 to aromatic/hydrophobic residues will enhance binding affinity by optimizing hydrophobic interactions and charge complementarity in the SSTR2 binding pocket

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Structural refinement must be explicitly prioritized alongside energy optimization to achieve both favorable binding affinity and model quality

proposed_changes.rationale: Current ddG threshold is too lenient, filtering out candidates with more favorable binding energies
Prioritize structural refinement alongside energy optimization to address low pLDDT/dock scores
